initial_program:
% Grid dimensions
n_rows(N) :- N = #count{ R : input(R, _, _) }.
n_cols(M) :- M = #count{ C : input(_, C, _) }.
row(0..N-1) :- n_rows(N).
col(0..M-1) :- n_cols(M).
output_cell(R,C) :- row(R), col(C).

% Manhattan distance to a 3seed
dist3(R,C,D) :- input(SR,SC,3),
                RD = #max{R - SR, SR - R},
                CD = #max{C - SC, SC - C},
                D = RD + CD.

% Manhattan distance to a 2seed
dist2(R,C,D) :- input(SR,SC,2),
                RD = #max{R - SR, SR - R},
                CD = #max{C - SC, SC - C},
                D = RD + CD.

% Nearest distance for colour 3
d3_min(R,C,D3) :- #min{ D : dist3(R,C,D) }.

% Nearest distance for colour 2
d2_min(R,C,D2) :- #min{ D : dist2(R,C,D) }.

% Exactly one colour for each cell
1 { output(R,C,Color) : 0; 2; 3 } 1 :- output_cell(R,C).

% Enforce the nearestnonzero rule (colour3 wins ties)
constraint
    :- output(R,C,2), d3_min(R,C,D3), d2_min(R,C,D2), D3 <= D2.
constraint
    :- output(R,C,3), d3_min(R,C,D3), d2_min(R,C,D2), D2 < D3.
% Zero colour is only allowed when there is no 3seed nor a 2seed.
constraint
    :- output(R,C,0), d3_min(R,C,D3), d2_min(R,C,D2).

#show output/3.

rounds.program_after:
% Grid dimensions
n_rows(N) :- N = #count{ R : input(R, _, _) }.
n_cols(M) :- M = #count{ C : input(_, C, _) }.
row(0..N-1) :- n_rows(N).
col(0..M-1) :- n_cols(M).
output_cell(R,C) :- row(R), col(C).

% Manhattan distance to a 3seed
dist3(R,C,D) :- input(SR,SC,3),
                RD = #max{R - SR, SR - R},
                CD = #max{C - SC, SC - C},
                D = RD + CD.

% Manhattan distance to a 2seed
dist2(R,C,D) :- input(SR,SC,2),
                RD = #max{R - SR, SR - R},
                CD = #max{C - SC, SC - C},
                D = RD + CD.

% Nearest distance for colour 3
d3_min(R,C,D3) :- #min{ D : dist3(R,C,D) }.

% Nearest distance for colour 2
d2_min(R,C,D2) :- #min{ D : dist2(R,C,D) }.

1 { output(R,C,Color) : 0; 2; 3 } 1 :- output_cell(R,C).
1 { output(R,C,Color) : 0; 2; 3 } 1 :- output_cell(R,C).

% Enforce the nearestnonzero rule (colour3 wins ties)
constraint
    :- output(R,C,2), d3_min(R,C,D3), d2_min(R,C,D2), D3 <= D2.
constraint
    :- output(R,C,3), d3_min(R,C,D3), d2_min(R,C,D2), D2 < D3.
% Zero colour is only allowed when there is no 3seed nor a 2seed.
constraint
    :- output(R,C,0), d3_min(R,C,D3), d2_min(R,C,D2).

#show output/3.

rounds.program_after:
% Grid dimensions
n_rows(N) :- N = #count{ R : input(R, _, _) }.
n_cols(M) :- M = #count{ C : input(_, C, _) }.
row(0..N-1) :- n_rows(N).
col(0..M-1) :- n_cols(M).
output_cell(R,C) :- row(R), col(C).

% Manhattan distance to a 3seed
dist3(R,C,D) :- input(SR,SC,3),
                RD = #max{R - SR, SR - R},
                CD = #max{C - SC, SC - C},
                D = RD + CD.

% Manhattan distance to a 2seed
dist2(R,C,D) :- input(SR,SC,2),
                RD = #max{R - SR, SR - R},
                CD = #max{C - SC, SC - C},
                D = RD + CD.

% Nearest distance for colour 3
d3_min(R,C,D3) :- #min{ D : dist3(R,C,D) }.

% Nearest distance for colour 2
d2_min(R,C,D2) :- #min{ D : dist2(R,C,D) }.

1 { output(R,C,Color) : 0; 2; 3 } 1 :- output_cell(R,C).
1 { output(R,C,Color) : 0; 2; 3 } 1 :- output_cell(R,C).

% Enforce the nearestnonzero rule (colour3 wins ties)
constraint
    :- output(R,C,2), d3_min(R,C,D3), d2_min(R,C,D2), D3 <= D2.
constraint
    :- output(R,C,3), d3_min(R,C,D3), d2_min(R,C,D2), D2 < D3.
% Zero colour is only allowed when there is no 3seed nor a 2seed.
constraint
    :- output(R,C,0), d3_min(R,C,D3), d2_min(R,C,D2).

#show output/3.

final_program:
% Grid dimensions
n_rows(N) :- N = #count{ R : input(R, _, _) }.
n_cols(M) :- M = #count{ C : input(_, C, _) }.
row(0..N-1) :- n_rows(N).
col(0..M-1) :- n_cols(M).
output_cell(R,C) :- row(R), col(C).

% Manhattan distance to a 3seed
dist3(R,C,D) :- input(SR,SC,3),
                RD = #max{R - SR, SR - R},
                CD = #max{C - SC, SC - C},
                D = RD + CD.

% Manhattan distance to a 2seed
dist2(R,C,D) :- input(SR,SC,2),
                RD = #max{R - SR, SR - R},
                CD = #max{C - SC, SC - C},
                D = RD + CD.

% Nearest distance for colour 3
d3_min(R,C,D3) :- #min{ D : dist3(R,C,D) }.

% Nearest distance for colour 2
d2_min(R,C,D2) :- #min{ D : dist2(R,C,D) }.

1 { output(R,C,Color) : 0; 2; 3 } 1 :- output_cell(R,C).
1 { output(R,C,Color) : 0; 2; 3 } 1 :- output_cell(R,C).

% Enforce the nearestnonzero rule (colour3 wins ties)
constraint
    :- output(R,C,2), d3_min(R,C,D3), d2_min(R,C,D2), D3 <= D2.
constraint
    :- output(R,C,3), d3_min(R,C,D3), d2_min(R,C,D2), D2 < D3.
% Zero colour is only allowed when there is no 3seed nor a 2seed.
constraint
    :- output(R,C,0), d3_min(R,C,D3), d2_min(R,C,D2).

#show output/3.
